/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libsingle_robo_custom_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libsingle_robo_custom_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/single_robo_custom_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/single_robo_custom_interface/msg/detail/cluster_points__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/single_robo_custom_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/single_robo_custom_interface/msg/detail/com_with_id__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
